goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 14:30'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 14:30
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
